/opt/intel/compilers_and_libraries_2019/linux/bin/intel64/icpc   -v -lstdc++ -fopenmp  -DMKL_ILP64 -mkl-parallel   CMakeFiles/TST.dir/main.cpp.o  -o TST  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/usr/local/magma/lib /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcusolver.so /usr/local/magma/lib/libmagma.so -lmkl_rt -lpthread /opt/intel/compilers_and_libraries_2019.0.117/linux/compiler/lib/intel64_lin/libiomp5.so -lpthread
